feedback: The leaking pipe in the bathroom was fixed within an hour. Excellent response time!
The electrician left a mess on my desk and the light switch is still flickering.
Great job on the AC repair; the room is finally cool again. Thank you!
Reported the broken window latch three days ago and still haven't seen anyone.
The new paint job looks professional and the room feels much brighter now.
Wall socket was replaced quickly, but they forgot to turn the breaker back on.
Very polite staff and the door lock works perfectly now. Highly satisfied.
The pest control treatment was ineffective; I still see ants everywhere.
Smooth experience with the wardrobe repair. The hinges no longer squeak.
Maintenance arrived without notice while I was sleeping. Very unprofessional.
